title: From The Fog++
description: From-The-Fog is a horror modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, combining From the Fog with other chilling mods for an immersive, atmospheric survival experience.
body:
## From The Fog++

[![Ko-fi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Fluxoah/Banners/main/kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/fluxoah)
[![Ko-fi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Fluxoah/Banners/main/available_on_modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/from-the-fog++/versions)

Dive into a world full of mystery, horror, and adventure! This **optimized modpack** introduces terrifying new entities like **Stalkers, Dwellers, the Man from the Fog, Herobrine**, and the **Cave Dweller**. Explore dark caves, encounter unique mobs, and experience a thrilling new dimension of Minecraft like never before.

---

### Currently Included Mods
- **Man From The Fog** – Face eerie stalkers in the mist.  
- **From the Fog** – Adds atmospheric horrors to your world.  
- **Farmer’s Delight** – Expand your farming and cooking options.  
- **Cave Dweller Evolved** – Encounter dangerous cave-dwelling mobs.  
- **Alex’s Mobs & Alex’s Caves** – Add new creatures and underground biomes.  
- **The Box of Horrors** – Unlock mysterious and terrifying surprises.

---

### Optimized & Upcoming Features
⚡ **Optimized for smooth performance!**  
⚡ **New versions are in development!**  
Stay tuned for more content, mobs, and features.  

**Full mod list** is available on the version pages.
